hero.tagline: We Connect People. We Create Opportunities. We Transform Communities.

projects.label: Project Showcase
projects.title: Impact in Action.
projects.desc: Discover the international and local initiatives promoted by Check-IN. Real projects creating tangible change in the lives of youth and volunteers.
projects.p1_desc: A long-term volunteering project focused on environmental sustainability, biodiversity conservation, and ecological education for local communities in Sweden.
projects.p1_results: Created 3 urban community gardens, planted 500 trees, and held 20 recycling workshops in regional schools.
projects.p2_desc: Intensive training course aimed at youth workers to share inclusive methodologies applied to marginalized youth and those at risk of exclusion.
projects.p2_results: Published a European active inclusion methodological guide with 15 practical dynamics, used by more than 40 NGOs.
projects.p3_desc: National youth participation initiative to co-create tech-based civic solutions and social activism with local municipalities.
projects.p3_results: Developed an open-source web application for youth municipal proposals, tested across 3 Portuguese municipalities.
projects.p4_desc: Transnational cooperation project promoting the European Green Deal and democratic involvement of youth in climate policies.
projects.p4_results: Organized 5 citizen assemblies in cooperation with city halls and sent 10 formal proposals to the European Parliament.
projects.p5_title: Youth Mentors Alliance: KA2 Capacity Building
projects.p5_desc: Strategic KA2 partnership to develop formal youth mentoring curricula and professional development support.
projects.p5_results: Created an online, certified youth mentoring course attended by over 250 European participants.
projects.p6_desc: Youth exchange bringing together 30 youth leaders to share school representation practices and democratic processes.
projects.p6_results: Drafted the Youth for Democracy final declaration and built an international student representative network.

opportunities.label: Open Calls
opportunities.title: Join Us Today.
opportunities.desc: Explore fully funded volunteering vacancies, certified training courses, and cultural exchanges. Travel, accommodation, and food expenses are fully covered by the program!
opportunities.o1_title: ESC Volunteering: Digital Education & Social Inclusion
opportunities.o1_desc: We are looking for motivated volunteers to support local centers in organizing basic digital skills workshops and educational support for young migrants.
opportunities.o1_req: Aged 18 to 30, functional English, interest in non-formal education and social inclusion.
opportunities.o2_title: Training Course: Digital Artivism for Democracy
opportunities.o2_desc: International course for youth workers to learn how to combine artistic expression, visual arts, and digital tools to build democratic campaigns.
opportunities.o2_req: Youth workers, teachers, or social workers residing in Portugal, with no age limit.
opportunities.o3_desc: Exchange focusing on reducing the ecological footprint in cities. Participants will collaborate to co-create local green strategies.
opportunities.o3_req: Aged 18 to 25 (group leaders have no age limit), interest in urban sustainability.
opportunities.o4_desc: Join local permaculture, community garden, and organic market projects to raise citizen awareness of healthy eating habits.
opportunities.o4_req: Aged 18 to 30, proactive attitude, love for outdoor activities and fieldwork.

form.title: Application Form
form.name: First Name
form.warning: By submitting, you confirm that you are between 18 and 30 years old and legally reside in Portugal for European funding eligibility purposes.
form.success_desc: Thank you for your interest. The Check-IN Portugal team will be in touch very shortly.

testimonials.label: Testimonials
testimonials.title: Stories that Inspire.
testimonials.desc: Nothing speaks louder than the direct experience of our participants. Discover real stories of impact from our mobilities.
testimonials.s1_quote: Volunteering with Check-IN was the most enriching experience of my life. I learned to live out of my comfort zone, collaborated with people from all over Europe, and led ecological workshops. I recommend it to everyone!
testimonials.s2_project: Erasmus+ KA1 in Italy - Social Inclusion
testimonials.s2_quote: The practical tools for social inclusion and theatre facilitation I learned in Palermo completely changed the way I run activities at my youth center in Lisbon. Priceless.

gallery.label: Media Gallery
gallery.title: Check-IN Moments.
gallery.desc: Browse through photos of our exchanges, training courses, and local events. The European Union in dynamic images.
gallery.i5_title: Final presentation of a youth project
gallery.i6_title: Training session on mentoring and leadership

footer.desc: Check-IN Association – Cooperation and Development. A non-profit organization dedicated to youth education and international mobility.
footer.accreditation_desc: Check-IN holds the European Solidarity Corps Quality Label and Erasmus+ Accreditation in the fields of Youth and Adult Education.
footer.love: Developed with love for European youth.
